summary: Iteration 68 - Bank Accounts Management & Opening Balance Features. All 14 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified - Bank management dialog, per-bank balance cards, opening balance settings with per-bank inputs, bank account dropdown in transaction form, and MSP payment modes without 'Cash' option.
seed_data_creation: Test data created with TEST_ prefix during testing, cleaned up after. Opening balance saved: Cash=50000, Bank of Baroda=100000, State Bank of India=75000
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bank Accounts feature fully working. Two banks exist: 'Bank of Baroda' and 'State Bank of India'. Opening balance for 2025-2026 is set to Cash=50000, BOB=100000, SBI=75000. MSP Payment modes only include NEFT, RTGS, Cheque, DD (no Cash).

backend_tests: GET /api/bank-accounts - returns list of bank accounts
GET /api/cash-book/opening-balance - returns cash, bank, bank_details, source
PUT /api/cash-book/opening-balance - saves cash and per-bank opening balances
GET /api/cash-book/summary - returns bank_details with per-bank in/out/balance/opening
POST /api/cash-book with bank_name - creates bank transaction with specific bank
Bank transaction appears in correct bank's summary
Existing banks (Bank of Baroda, State Bank of India) are present
GET /api/cash-book returns transactions with bank_name field
frontend_verified: Cash Book page shows summary cards with Opening Balance, Cash in Hand, Total Bank Balance, Total Balance
Per-bank balance cards shown below summary - Bank of Baroda, State Bank of India, Other
Bank Accounts button opens dialog showing existing banks with delete buttons
Bank Accounts dialog has input field and Add button to add new banks
Set Opening Balance button opens dialog with Cash input and per-bank inputs
Opening Balance dialog shows calculated Total Opening
New Transaction form shows Bank Account dropdown when 'Bank' account is selected
Bank Account dropdown lists: '-- Select Bank --', 'Bank of Baroda', 'State Bank of India'
MSP Payment Mode dropdown has ONLY: '-- Select --', 'NEFT', 'RTGS', 'Cheque', 'DD'
MSP Payment Mode dropdown does NOT have 'Cash' option (as required)
